allow:
Bash(powershell -File - << 'PSEOF'
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing
$wshell = New-Object -ComObject wscript.shell
$wshell.AppActivate\('5176'\) | Out-Null
Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 2000
$screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds
$bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\)
$graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bitmap\)
$graphics.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\)
$bitmap.Save\('C:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\screenshot.png'\)
$graphics.Dispose\(\)
$bitmap.Dispose\(\)
Write-Host "Done"
PSEOF)

Bash(powershell -File - << 'PSEOF'
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing

# Open browser and wait for it to load
Start-Process "http://localhost:5176"
Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 3000

$screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds
$bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\)
$graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bitmap\)
$graphics.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\)
$bitmap.Save\('C:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\screenshot.png'\)
$graphics.Dispose\(\)
$bitmap.Dispose\(\)
Write-Host "Done"
PSEOF)

Bash(powershell -File - << 'PSEOF'
Add-Type -AssemblyName Microsoft.Office.Interop.Word
$word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application
$word.Visible = $false
$doc = $word.Documents.Open\('c:\\Users\\user\\Downloads\\i wear.docx'\)
$text = $doc.Content.Text
$doc.Close\(\)
$word.Quit\(\)
$text
PSEOF)
